prompt:
A candid hyper-realistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph — looks like an UNSTAGED iPhone snap of someone's open gym bag at home. NO PEOPLE in frame, lived-in mid-moment feel.

SCENE: a worn canvas duffle gym bag unzipped on a light-oak wood floor, contents partially spilled out. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label legible) sits ON ITS SIDE just outside the bag's open mouth, having casually rolled out. Around it: a wrinkled grey training tee partially in the bag, a folded sage-green hand towel half-pulled-out, a stainless-steel shaker bottle on its side, a pair of running shoes nearby with the laces undone, a small AirPods case, a coiled jump-rope. Visible asymmetry, real-life clutter.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight from a window on the right side of the frame, naturally washing the floor scene. The jar's curved black plastic catches a soft daylight sheen even lying on its side.

FRAMING: the jar is NOT centered or staged — it's just one item among the gym-bag spill. Slight high angle (looking down at the floor from standing). Some items cropped at the edges. Candid iPhone-snap feel, NOT a styled product flat-lay.

STYLE: hyper-realistic candid photography, slight grain, natural shadows, real-life lived-in composition. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO hands, NO people.
